allow: PowerShell($dll = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("G:\\Vintagestory\\VintagestoryAPI.dll"\); $type = $dll.GetType\("Vintagestory.API.Common.Entities.Entity"\); $methods = $type.GetMethods\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::DeclaredOnly\); $methods | Where-Object {$_.Name -eq "Revive"} | ForEach-Object { $sig = "$\($_.ReturnType.Name\) $\($_.Name\)"; if \($_.GetParameters\(\)\) { $sig += "\(" + [string]::Join\(", ", \($_.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.ParameterType.Name\) `$$\($_.Name\)" }\)\) + "\)" } else { $sig += "\(\)" }; $sig })

PowerShell($dll = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("G:\\Vintagestory\\VintagestoryAPI.dll"\); $type = $dll.GetType\("Vintagestory.API.Common.Entities.EntityBehavior"\); $methods = $type.GetMethods\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::NonPublic -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance\); $methods | Where-Object {$_.Name -eq "OnEntityRevive"} | ForEach-Object { $sig = "$\($_.ReturnType.Name\) $\($_.Name\)"; if \($_.GetParameters\(\)\) { $sig += "\(" + [string]::Join\(", ", \($_.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.ParameterType.Name\) `$$\($_.Name\)" }\)\) + "\)" } else { $sig += "\(\)" }; $sig })
